title: Broad Phase, Circle, Rect, Mask, Seam, and Swept Collision Detection · Program Forensics
summary: A preserved game trace contains one plausible state, timing, input, vector, rendering, collision, ownership, audio, accessibility, packaging, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in layered collision detection pipeline and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose circle, AABB, rotated bound, polygon, or mask from acceptable false positives, cost, and player expectation.
Use groups, spatial partitioning, sweep, or bounded pair sets to reduce candidates without dropping possible overlaps.
Compare squared center distance with squared radius sum and test tangent, overlap, separation, zero radius, and float tolerance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Swept Seam Cases
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: asteroids-swept-seam-cases-1gyjmj" that uses case 7705 to layer broad-phase pruning, circle or rectangle checks, masks where justified, seam cases, and swept tests for tunneling. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not claim native pygame-ce, SDL, window, controller, mixer, filesystem, package, GPU, installer, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, released pygame-ce 2.5.7, fixed and headless SDL fixtures, real devices, licensed assets, accessibility playtests, profiling, clean installations, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Swept Seam Cases.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Swept Seam Cases into observable performance evidence. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Swept Seam Cases, keep Swept Seam Cases connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-swept-seam-cases-1gyjmj
# Competency: asteroids-swept-seam-cases.
# Case 7705: a headless continuous-integration replay.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: lose window focus while thrust and fire are held, then prove both actions release safely.
def evidence_asteroids_swept_seam_cases_1gyjmj(distance_squared: float = 400.0, radius_sum: float = 24.0, broad_phase_pairs: int = 18, narrow_phase_pairs: int = 3, swept_tested: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1gyjmj = "1gyjmj-jmjyg1-7705"
    assert evidence_variant_1gyjmj
    evidence_axes_1gyjmj = (
        "player1gyjmj",
        "seed7705",
        "inputjmjyg1",
        "frame1gyjmj7705",
        "state77051gyjmj",
        "playtestjmjyg17705",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1gyjmj)) == 6
    if distance_squared < 0.0 or radius_sum < 0.0:
        return False, distance_squared, "collision-domain"
    if narrow_phase_pairs > broad_phase_pairs:
        return False, narrow_phase_pairs, "phase-inversion"
    overlaps = distance_squared <= radius_sum * radius_sum
    if not swept_tested:
        return False, narrow_phase_pairs, "tunneling-gap"
    if broad_phase_pairs < 1:
        return False, broad_phase_pairs, "missing-broad-phase"
    assert narrow_phase_pairs <= broad_phase_pairs
    return True, int(overlaps), "layered-collision"
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Swept Seam Cases structural check is only one gate. layered collision detection pipeline must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
